chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P.NO.S-1334 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For orders on MA-6274/2017 2. For orders on office objection. 3. For katcha peshi. 29.09.2017 Mr. Imtiaz Ali Mahar, State Counsel = 1. Granted. 2&3. Petitioner as well as his Counsel are called absent, however, since the life and liberty of the petitioner is involved in this petition, therefore, in the interest of justice the matter is taken up. From perusal of the petition, it appears that the petitioner is seeking direction to the official respondents to provide protection to him as well as his other family members. Learned State Counsel files statement alongwith comments of respondent No.2, which are taken on record The private respondents No.5 to 7 namely Shambo, Aalam and Bhomon are directed not to cause any harassment to the petitioner, whereas the official respondents are directed to discharge their functions and duties strictly in accordance with law in a fair and reasonable manner without patronizing any group or individuals. The petitioner and the private respondents are at liberty to seek remedy of their grievances, if any, before the appropriate forum by invoking due process of law and not by taking law in their hands. Since the private respondents No.5 to 7 are not in attendance, therefore, the concerned SHO is also directed to serve the copy of this order on the above named private respondents by calling them in Police Station and compliance of such service should be furnished with the Additional Registrar of this Court. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms.

Since the private respondents No.5 to 7 are not in attendance, therefore, the concerned SHO is also directed to serve the copy of this order on the above named private respondents by calling them in Police Station and compliance of such service should be furnished with the Additional Registrar of this Court. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE Shahid
